response.justification: Strong senior engineer with broad full-stack, open-source, and Linux/Unix experience, plus founder-level architecture work on a Kubernetes-deployed geo-data platform. However, the role explicitly requires German at C1 and the candidate self-reports only Basic German, which is a hard mismatch for a client-facing Head of Development position in a German-speaking market. Leadership/team-management evidence is also thin compared to what an executive-level role demands.
strengths: Broad senior full-stack and architecture experience across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices
Strong open-source/Linux orientation with founder experience running a Kubernetes-deployed platform
Demonstrated mentoring, workshop, and training delivery (TDD, Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos)
concerns: German only at Basic level vs required C1 — likely disqualifying for client-facing leadership
No explicit formal team-lead/Head-of-Development title or headcount management evidence
UML and requirements-management proficiency not demonstrated in resume

key_factors.factor: German language gap (Basic vs C1 required)
